name: Elf Backpack
author: Poki
description: Elf Backpack is a magical merge game where you help a brave elf gear up for epic battles! Merge identical items like swords, hemlets, and potions to create stronger gear, then organize them smartly in your backpack to boost your elf’s power. Fight fierce enemies, earn coins, and use them to upgrade your hero even further. Ready to pack, merge, and conquer? How to play Elf Backpack? Click or tap to make the choice. Who created Elf Backpack? Elf Backpack is created by Panda Pasha Games. Play their other games on Poki: Samurai Punch , Survival Island , Prison Punch , Fishing World and Blacksmith Tycoon ! How can I play Elf Backpack for free? You can play Elf Backpack for free on Poki. Can I play Elf Backpack on mobile devices and desktop? Elf Backpack can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
